verses.text: Ka Pasian, ka Pasian aw, bang hangin kei hong nusia na hi hiam? Nong huhna ding ka hong thumna panin bang hangin gamla om na hi hiam
Ka Pasian aw, sunin kong kiko a, ahi zongin nong dawng kei hi. Zanin zong ka kiko a, ahi zongin lungsim nopna ka mu thei tuan kei hi
Ahih hangin nang na siangtho a, Israel-te' pahtawi-in na tu hi
Ka pate un nangmah hong muang uh hi. Amaute in hong muang uh a, nangmah in amaute na honkhia hi
Nangma tungah amaute in hong ko uh a, amaute kihon hi. Nangmah hong muang uh a, guaksuaklo uh hi
Ahih hangin kei pen lungno khat bang lel ka hi a, mi ka bang kei hi. Mite' ko gawpgawp, mite' simmawh ka hi hi
Hong mu mi khempeuh in kei hong zahko-in, hong mukpiksan uh a, a lu uh hong peisan hi
“ Topa' tungah amah in ama thu ap hi. Amah kihonkhia sak un; amah deih ahih manin honkhia ta hen!” hong cihsan uh hi
Ahih hangin nang pen gilsung panin kei a hong suaksakpa na hi a, ka nu' ang sungah a muan'huai-in keimah na hong kem hi
Ka suah tunga kipan nangma tungah kong tung a, ka nu in hong paii lai-a kipan keima Pasian na hi hi
Haksatna nai ahih manin kei tawh kigamla om kei in; kei a hong huh ding kuamah dang omlo hi
Bawngtal tampi tak in kei hong umcih uh a, Bashan gam bawngtal hatte in kei hong umcih uh hi
Humpinelkai hawk, a sabawh nuam bangin amaute in kei hong kamkat beba uh hi
Tui buakkhiat bangin kei hong kibuakhia a, ka guh ka taang khempeuh kilawi mangkhin hi. Ka lungtang khuainun bang a, ka awm sungah tuisuak hi
Ka thahatna, leibeel phel bangin keu a, ka leii zong toncip ta hi. Nangmah in leivui sungah kei na hong koih hi
Ka kiimah uite om a, siatna bawl mi honkhat in kei hong umcih uh hi. Ka khut ka khete hong sunletzo uh hi
Ka guh khempeuh kimu thei hi. Amaute in hong sal gega uh hi
Amaute in ka puante hawm uh a, ka puan a hawmna dingun lai ai a san uh hi
Ahih hangin Topa aw, gamla om kei in. Keimah a hong huhpa aw, a huh dingin hong manlang in
Namsau panin keimah hong hon in la, uite' kiang panin ka nuntakna hong hon in
Humpinelkai kam panin keimah hong hon in la, gamsialte' ki panin a cimawh keimah hong hon in
Ka u ka naute tungah nangma min ka gen ding a, mihon kikhopna laizangah nangmah kong phat ding hi
Topa a zahtak mi khempeuh aw, amah phat un. Jakob' suan mi khempeuh aw, amah minthangsak un. Israel mi khempeuh aw, amah lamdang sa un
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a thuak mi' gimna simmawh bawllo a, zong kihbawl lo hi. Ama kiang pan a mai seello a, ama tungah a koh ciangin, amah in a za hi
Mihonpite lakah nang ka hong phatna ding na piangsak a, nang a hong zahtakte' mai-ah ka thuciamna kong pia ding hi
Gimna a thuakte in kham takin ne ding uh a, amah a zongte in Topa phat ding uh hi. A lungsim uh nuam tawntung ta hen
Leitung mi khempeuh in phawkin Topa' lamah kihei ding uh a, minam khempeuh in ama mai-ah bia ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ukna pen Topa-a' hi a, minamte tungah amah in a uk hi
Hi hi, a kiphasak mi khempeuh ama mai-ah kunsuk ding uh a, a sithei mihing khempeuh ama mai-ah kun ding uh hi
A hong khangkik mite in ama na sem ding uh hi. Mite in a hong piang lai ding mite tungah Topa' thu gen ding uh a
a suak nailo mite tungah ama sepsa, hotkhiatna thu gen ding uh hi.
